entries.parentStatement: Machine guard was open while the line was running.
entries.responseText: What normally made bypassing the interlock feel acceptable or necessary at the time?
entries.userAnswer: Maintenance bypassed the interlock to keep production moving.

entries.parentStatement: Maintenance bypassed the interlock to keep production moving.
entries.responseText: What conditions or trade-offs made the planned maintenance window hard to use?
entries.userAnswer: The planned maintenance window was cancelled after a delivery delay.

entries.parentStatement: The planned maintenance window was cancelled after a delivery delay.
entries.responseText: What should be kept or changed so delayed deliveries do not make bypassing safeguards the practical path?
entries.userAnswer: Supervisors had no escalation path for stopping the line when the shipment was late.
